arts.ttl: Ipswich 'need to do better' and couldn't handle Man Utd - McKenna
arts.sum: Ipswich Town manager Kieran McKenna says he is "frustrated" and that his side "weren't able to handle" Manchester United in their 3-2 defeat at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United 3-2 Ipswich: Harry Maguire seals dramatic Premier League win for ten-men Red Devils
arts.sum: January signing Patrick Dorgu endures difficult night at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand and Robbie Savage lay into Andre Onana after another nightmare Man United performance saw the goalkeeper play his part in two more errors leading to goals
arts.sum: Man United ran out the 3-2 winners on home turf, but their three points were not won without strife, with Ruben Amorim 's players behind in the opening five minutes courtesy of Philogene's strike.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim to talk to Alejandro Garnacho after reaction to being substituted
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho was unhappy to be substituted after Man United were reduced to ten men against Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt makes honest admission about Manchester United's performance vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Man United produced a spirited performance to beat Ipswich Town 3-2 at Old Trafford on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Man United fans boo Ruben Amorim's decision to substitute Alejandro Garnacho against Ipswich - as forward heads straight down the tunnel before raising eyebrows with Instagram post
arts.sum: United scraped to a much-needed victory against the Tractor Boys, despite playing more than half of the game with 10 men after new signing Patrick Dorgu was sent off at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 3-2 Ipswich: Match report & 5 talking points as 10-man Red Devils battle to victory
arts.sum: Match report and analysis as Manchester United ended a three-game win-less streak in the Premier League by beating Ipswich Town at Old Trafford on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Fernandes calls on ‘suffering’ Man United to be ‘braver’ after Ipswich win
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has called on Manchester United to be ‘braver’ after edging out Ipswich Town at Old Trafford. Ruben Amorim’s side survived going down to 10 men before half-time to claim an important three points with a 3-2 win on home soil. The night started disastrously for the Red Devils, after a calamitous mix-up from […] The post Fernandes calls on ‘suffering’ Man United to be ‘braver’ after Ipswich win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd issues remain but Ipswich win is welcome reprieve for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED 3-2 IPSWICH TOWN: Ruben Amorim's men overcame some huge first half setbacks on a challenging evening at Old Trafford to record a vital victory

arts.ttl: Not perfect or pretty but Man Utd stayed in control - Amorin
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorin praises his side for staying in control after going down to 10 men to beat Ipswich Town 3-2 at Old Trafford.
